organisations.heading: Organisations
organisations.subtitle: Discover volunteer organisations in your community
organisations.error_load_retry: Failed to load organisations. Please try again.
organisations.register_subtitle: Register your volunteer organisation to post opportunities and manage volunteers
organisations.form_name_min_length: Name must be at least 3 characters
organisations.form_description_placeholder: Describe your organisation, its mission, and the type of volunteering work you do...
organisations.form_description_min_length: Description must be at least 20 characters
organisations.form_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
organisations.form_website_invalid: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
organisations.form_save_error: Failed to register organisation. Please try again.
organisations.form_success_message: Your organisation has been submitted for review. An admin will approve it shortly.
organisations.pending_approval_notice: Your organisation is pending admin approval. Once approved, it will appear publicly and you can post volunteer opportunities.
organisations.terms_item_1: I confirm this is a legitimate organisation engaged in volunteering, community service, charity work, or non-profit activities.
organisations.terms_item_2: The information I provide is accurate and I am authorised to register this organisation on the platform.
organisations.terms_item_3: I understand that the organisation will be reviewed by an administrator before it is publicly listed.
organisations.terms_item_4: I agree to use the platform responsibly and ensure all volunteer opportunities posted are genuine and lawful.
organisations.terms_item_5: I understand that the platform administrators may remove the organisation or its listings if they violate community guidelines.
organisations.terms_agreement: I have read and agree to the organisation registration terms above.
organisations.terms_required: You must agree to the terms to register your organisation.
